model_specification_line: model = smf.wls('full_time ~ treated + post + treated:post + C(sex) + educ + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, continuous US residence criterion)
birthyr between 1975 and 1996 (cohort window: control born 1975-1981, treated born 1982-1996)
year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre-DACA and post-DACA periods; 2012 excluded as transition year)
